title: Power Coils
description: Adds 6 coil items from the classic Roblox era!
body:
![Alex, Steve and Zuri using the three main power coils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c7da4e17d9cd4db9740f69077c0d157aee11d89.png)
**__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________**
This mod features those funny coil items from the classic era of Roblox.

Jump higher, run faster and heal yourself using these powerful coils!
**__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________**

- Gravity Coil: Makes you jump higher and fall slower!
- Speed Coil: Makes you run twice as fast!
- Regen Coil: Heals you at a rate of 1 heart per second!
- Fusion Coil: Makes you jump higher, fall slower, and run twice as fast!
- Snowy Gravity Coil: Same as the gravity coil, but you also leave a snowy trail as you move!
- Dual Gravity Coil: Equip a pair of gravity coils in your legs, and jump even higher!

(Note: All coils include their original deploy sound effect, exept the regen coil which didn't have any sounds, so I gave it one).

## More Info & Other Details
- Power Coils has two config files to customize the mod's functions.
- Feel free to use any of my mods in your modpacks!
